moments.title: Summer Vibes
moments.blurb: The summer season is in full swing, and the warm weather is here to stay for a while.

angles.name: Summer Fun
angles.copy: School's out, and the sun is shining - what are your favorite summer activities?

angles.name: Staycation
angles.copy: With the summer weather here, why not plan a staycation and explore what the UK has to offer?

angles.name: Festival Season
angles.copy: The summer months mean one thing - festival season is here - which one will you be attending?

moments.title: Sir Tom Jones 86th Birthday
moments.blurb: Sir Tom Jones, the legendary Welsh singer, would have been 86 on July 13.

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Sir Tom Jones, a music icon, would have been 86 on July 13 - which of his songs is your favorite?

angles.name: Welsh Legend
angles.copy: We are celebrating the life and music of Sir Tom Jones, a true Welsh legend - tune in for some of his greatest hits.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Sir Tom Jones' voice is truly timeless - which of his songs do you think has stood the test of time?

moments.title: The 154th Open Championship
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship is being held at Royal Birkdale from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf's Biggest Stage
angles.copy: The Open Championship is one of the most prestigious golf tournaments in the world - who do you think will take home the trophy?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is one of the most challenging golf courses in the world - what makes it so unique?

angles.name: Golfing Greats
angles.copy: The Open Championship has seen some of the greatest golfers of all time compete - who is your favorite golfer of all time?

moments.title: The Royal Welsh Show
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show, one of the largest agricultural shows in Europe, is being held from July 20-23.

angles.name: Agricultural Heritage
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a celebration of Wales' rich agricultural heritage - what are you most looking forward to seeing?

angles.name: Rural Wales
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a showcase of rural Wales at its best - what do you love most about the Welsh countryside?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a fun day out for all the family - what are your favorite memories of the show?

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games are coming to Glasgow from July 23 to August 2.

angles.name: Global Sporting Event
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are a global sporting event that brings together athletes from around the world - which sports are you most looking forward to watching?

angles.name: Glasgow Pride
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are a source of pride for Glasgow and Scotland - what do you think will be the highlight of the games?

angles.name: Athletic Achievement
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are a celebration of athletic achievement - who do you think will be the star of the games?
